rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into the specified component implementation, preserving the AADL architecture structure.
generic_rules: Place interface-level contracts in component types; implementation-specific bindings in component implementations.
Do not introduce new ports, data types, or property references not present in the source AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use the syntax `annex agree {** ... **};` and must be embedded within valid AADL component or implementation declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not infer numeric bounds or convert Boolean/event ports to numeric expressions unless explicitly supported by the AADL model.
Do not assume AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) are visible as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
